steps.title: Set up
steps.content: For $ax^2+bx+c=0$, Vieta's formula gives sum of solutions $= -\frac{b}{a}$. Here $a=24$ and $b=-(12a+2b)$, so: $$\text{sum} = -\frac{-(12a+2b)}{24} = \frac{12a+2b}{24}$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Factor and reduce: $$\frac{12a+2b}{24}=\frac{2(6a+b)}{24}=\frac{6a+b}{12}$$ The problem says the sum equals $k(6a+b)$, so: $$k=\frac{1}{12}$$
